narrative:
Newton Twp D (precinct in Trumbull County) has 995 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.1 percentage points.
